channel.title: Power Platform Clinic - Tag - Tech Tweedie
channel.description: Power Platform Clinic - Tag - Tech Tweedie

item.title: Power Platform Clinic – Episode 5: Converting Forms with Images to PDF
item.description: In Episode 5 of the Power Platform Clinic, Duncan and Ian walk through converting a Microsoft Form—complete with text and image uploads—into a structured PDF using Power Automate. This proof of concept demonstrates data handling, file encoding, dynamic HTML generation, and emailing the final document.

item.title: Power Platform Clinic – Episode 4: Power Pages Authentication Options and Developer Accounts
item.description: In Episode 2 of Power Platform Clinic, Ian Tweedy and Duncan Boyne explore the different authentication options for Power Pages and guide you through how to set up your own developer account for Power Platform experimentation and learning.

item.title: Power Platform Clinic – Episode 2
item.description: In this episode of the Power Platform Clinic, Duncan and Ian discuss validating email domains using Power Automate, and Duncan shows how to create a Power BI app to collate reports for users.
